title: Cult of Light
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Cult of Light''' was a splinter group of the [[Charon/Legends|Charon]] civilization that existed in [[otherspace]]. Formed during the height of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], and working against the [[Charon Death Cult]], the Cult of Light held completely opposite views from their "doom bringing" brethren in that they sought peaceful contact with other species and to share technology. This group was unique in that they were the first Charon who developed [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] technology after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. Using this technology, the cult hoped to follow the [[Illuminated One]] to another [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]] and escape the black holes of otherspace.
